rationale: The proposed homestead exemption increase under Tax Code §11.13(b) concerns property tax appraisal and is wholly unrelated to Educ. Code §25.0875, which governs excused school absences for released time religious instruction courses.
quote: Sec. 25.0875. EXCUSED ABSENCE TO ATTEND RELEASED TIME COURSE.
_note: No overlap between proposed property tax change and this education attendance statute.
